samagam.title: Samāgam
samagam.subtitle: The Gathering
samagam.description: Samāgam is IndicSense's flagship convergence — talks, performances, and intellectual exchange where campus meets civilizational depth.

sangam.title: Saṅgam
sangam.subtitle: The Confluence
sangam.description: Saṅgam brings together smaller circles — reading groups, language workshops, and intimate dialogues on philosophy, art, and culture.

virasat.title: Vīrasat
virasat.subtitle: The Heritage
virasat.description: Vīrasat celebrates living heritage — festivals, yātrās, traditional arts, and immersive experiences that connect students to India's civilizational tapestry.
